name: German Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a large skillet until crisp; drain well and reserving the drippings.
2. Crumble the bacon, setting it aside.
3. Sauté the onion in the reserved bacon drippings until tender.
4. Add flour to the sautéed onions, stirring until smooth.
5. Gradually add water, cooking over medium heat while stirring until thickened.
6. Add cider vinegar, sugar, prepared mustard, salt, and pepper; stir well until combined.
7. Bring the mixture to a boil, then stir in the cooked potatoes, chopped eggs, celery, and parsley.
8. Serve immediately.
Yield: 8 servings
